filterFoldersAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the folder search input in the folder tree sidebar

showCurrentFolderTooltip.comment: Tooltip and aria-label for the toggle button to show only the current folder's resources

showNestedResourcesTooltip.comment: Tooltip and aria-label for the toggle button to show all nested resources recursively

addFolderAriaLabel.comment: Aria-label for the add folder button in the folder tree

addFolderTooltip.comment: Tooltip for the add folder button, includes keyboard shortcut
